decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful enchantments. The strategy involves using cards like Ba Sing Se and Earthbender Ascension to quickly build up a threatening board presence, while also utilizing cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam for additional value. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Erode and Snakeskin Veil, while also ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage. Overall, the goal is to apply pressure early and maintain momentum throughout the game.

The deck focuses on a reanimation strategy, utilizing cards that allow graveyard recursion to cheat out powerful creatures onto the battlefield. By combining cards that enable graveyard interaction with cards that support the reanimation process, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures early in the game. Additionally, disruptive cards such as Duress and Deadly Cover-Up are included to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect the reanimation strategy. Overall, the deck aims to quickly assemble its combo pieces to take control of the game and secure victory.

This Izzet Control deck focuses on using a wide array of spells to control the opponent's board and disrupt their game plan. By constantly drawing cards with spells like Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent, as well as using removal spells like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and maintain control of the game. Additionally, with cards like Gran-Gran and Iroh's Demonstration providing additional value, the deck is able to outlast and outmaneuver the opponent in the late game.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. By efficiently using mana and efficient creatures like Hardened Academic, Iron-Shield Elf, and Marauding Mako, the strategy is to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The deck also includes Burst Lightning and Practiced Offense for additional direct damage to pressure the opponent. Utilizing a combination of different land types and synergistic cards like Moonshadow and Multiversal Passage, the deck aims to maintain a strong board presence and consistently apply pressure to the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of countering spells, removal, card draw, and resource management. The deck includes a variety of control cards such as Negate, Erode, and Inevitable Defeat, along with card draw spells like Jeskai Revelation and Consult the Star Charts. Additionally, it has removal options like Lightning Helix and Day of Judgment to deal with threats. The deck also includes various lands to help fix mana and provide additional utility. Overall, the deck aims to outlast opponents and control the game until it can establish a winning position.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with low-cost, efficient spells and creatures in order to quickly deal damage and control the board. By utilizing cards that provide card selection like Sleight of Hand and Opt, along with versatile removal spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, the deck aims to maintain tempo and pressure the opponent. Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off provide evasive threats, while Stormchaser's Talent boosts the prowess of the creatures. The inclusion of some unique cards like Secret Identity and Impractical Joke add a fun and unpredictable element to the deck.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence and apply pressure to the opponent. By playing efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, as well as utilizing burn spells like Burst Lightning, the deck aims to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. The deck also includes card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to ensure a consistent flow of resources. With a mix of aggressive creatures, burn spells, and card advantage, this deck looks to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle using a combination of powerful creatures and direct damage spells. The deck focuses on utilizing cards that provide evasion, buff creatures, and deal damage, such as Winternight Stories, Flamebraider, Burst Lightning, and Ashling, Rekindled. By applying constant pressure and controlling the board with efficient threats, the deck aims to quickly defeat the opponent before they can stabilize. This aggressive strategy is further supported by a solid mana base and some control elements to disrupt the opponent's game plan.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a variety of spell cards to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain board control. It includes a mix of removal, card draw, and counter spells to keep the opponent on the defensive. The deck also utilizes lands that provide additional utility, such as producing multiple colors of mana or providing additional effects when they enter the battlefield. By carefully managing resources and responding to threats effectively, this deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through careful manipulation of the game state.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw, while maintaining a steady stream of damage with creatures like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to outlast and outmaneuver them until it can secure a victory. The inclusion of cards like Traumatic Critique and Impractical Joke adds a unique twist to the control strategy, creating opportunities to disrupt the opponent's hand and gain an advantage.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with efficient creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off, while disrupting opponents with cards like Burst Lightning and Get Out. The deck aims to control the tempo of the game through cheap spells and card draw effects like Opt and Sleight of Hand, allowing for quick aggression and finishing the game before opponents can stabilize. The inclusion of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off also adds a disruptive element, further hindering the opponent's strategy while maintaining pressure on the board.

The primary strategy of this deck is to control the board through a combination of removal spells and counterspells. By utilizing cards like Inevitable Defeat, Pyroclasm, Sear, and Swallowed by Leviathan, the deck aims to eliminate threats from the opponent's side of the battlefield. Additionally, the deck includes card draw and selection spells like Tablet of Discovery and Consult the Star Charts to maintain card advantage and find the necessary answers. Overall, the deck is designed to outlast opponents and ultimately win through incremental advantage and overwhelming control of the game.

This deck focuses on quickly building a strong board presence with low-cost creatures like Llanowar Elves and Badgermole Cub, supported by pump spells like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension. It utilizes ramp cards like Fabled Passage and Escape Tunnel to accelerate its mana production and enables explosive plays with cards like Bushwhack. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its aggressive strategy while also maintaining some late-game potential with big threats like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter.

The central idea of this deck revolves around utilizing aggressive creatures and spells in order to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck focuses on tempo and efficiency, with cards like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics for removal and control, while cards like Slickshot Show-Off and Stormchaser's Talent provide aggressive threats. The inclusion of secrets and spells like Secret Identity and Sleight of Hand add to the deck's versatility and unpredictability. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of fast creatures and efficient spells.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures and spells to apply pressure on the opponent, utilizing bounce spells and versatile creatures to control the board state. The goal is to maintain a continuous tempo advantage by efficiently using cheap spells and maintaining a steady flow of threats. The deck aims to close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize, while also having options to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells allows for a fast-paced and flexible playstyle that can adapt to different matchups.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures to outvalue and outpace opponents. By disrupting the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage and maintaining board presence, the deck aims to take control of the game and eventually win through card advantage or overwhelming the opponent with powerful spells and creatures. The deck utilizes a mix of burn spells, counterspells, and card draw to maintain control of the game and dictate the pace of play.
